overview: Diabetes is a chronic condition affecting how the body processes blood sugar. Poor control can lead to serious complications over time.
when_to_see_doctor: persistent high sugar|vision issues|non healing wounds

overview: Asthma causes inflammation and narrowing of airways. It leads to difficulty breathing and can be triggered by allergens.
symptoms: wheezing|shortness of breath|cough|chest tightness|night breathing issues
when_to_see_doctor: severe breathing issue|blue lips|no inhaler relief

overview: Hypertension is high pressure in blood vessels over time. It increases risk of heart disease and stroke.
A mild viral infection of nose and throat. It usually resolves within a week.
Influenza is a contagious viral infection affecting respiratory system. It can cause moderate to severe illness.
Migraine is a neurological disorder causing intense headaches. It often comes with nausea and sensitivity.
Anemia is a condition with low red blood cells. It reduces oxygen supply in the body.
Gastritis is inflammation of stomach lining. It may be caused by infection or diet.
home_remedies: avoid spicy food|eat light meals|warm water

overview: Acid reflux occurs when stomach acid flows back to esophagus. It causes burning sensation.
COVID-19 is a contagious viral respiratory illness. It can range from mild to severe symptoms.
Dengue is a mosquito-borne viral disease. It causes high fever and severe joint pain.
Malaria is caused by parasites transmitted by mosquitoes. It leads to fever cycles.
Typhoid is bacterial infection spread via contaminated food or water. It causes prolonged fever.
Food poisoning occurs from consuming contaminated food. It affects digestive system.
Chickenpox is a contagious viral infection causing itchy rash. It spreads easily.
Allergy occurs when immune system reacts to harmless substances. It can affect skin or breathing.
Bronchitis is inflammation of bronchial tubes. It causes cough and mucus.
Pneumonia is infection of lungs causing fluid buildup. It can be serious if untreated.
Arthritis causes inflammation and stiffness in joints. It affects mobility.
Obesity is excessive body fat accumulation. It increases risk of many diseases.
Depression is a mental health condition affecting mood. It causes persistent sadness.
Anxiety involves excessive worry and fear. It can interfere with daily life.
Stroke occurs when blood flow to brain is interrupted. It is a medical emergency.
Heart attack happens when blood flow to heart is blocked. Immediate care is required.
Thyroid disorders affect hormone production. It impacts metabolism.
PCOS is a hormonal disorder affecting women. It impacts menstrual cycle and fertility.
UTI is infection in urinary system. It causes pain and discomfort.
Constipation is difficulty passing stool. It affects digestion.
Diarrhea involves frequent loose stools. It can cause dehydration.
Sinusitis is inflammation of sinus cavities. It causes congestion and pain.
Eczema is a skin condition causing inflammation and itching. It can be chronic.
Psoriasis is an autoimmune condition causing rapid skin cell growth. It forms scaly patches.
Back pain is common due to muscle strain or posture issues. It affects mobility.
Eye infection causes redness and irritation. It can be contagious.
Ear infection causes pain and sometimes fever. Common in children.
Tooth decay damages tooth enamel. It leads to cavities.
Kidney stones are hard deposits in kidneys. They cause severe pain.
Liver disease affects liver function. It may be due to lifestyle or infection.
High cholesterol leads to fat buildup in blood vessels. It increases heart risk.
Vertigo causes spinning sensation. It affects balance.
Appendicitis is inflammation of appendix. It requires urgent treatment.
Hepatitis is inflammation of liver caused by viruses. It affects liver health.
TB is bacterial infection affecting lungs. It spreads through air.
HIV weakens immune system. AIDS is advanced stage of infection.
Neurological disorder affecting movement. It progresses over time.
Alzheimer’s affects memory and thinking. It worsens gradually.
Gout causes sudden joint pain due to uric acid buildup.
Lupus is autoimmune disease attacking body tissues. It affects multiple organs.
Pancreatitis is inflammation of pancreas affecting digestion. It can be acute or chronic.
Epilepsy is neurological disorder causing seizures. It affects brain activity.
